top_signals.title: Gold Rises Above $4,000 as Traders Weigh Inflation Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gold rose above $4,000 an ounce, as traders assess whether the Federal Reserve may move to tighten policy and the state of US-Iran talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Eni and Mercuria Agree to Join Forces in Commodity Trading
top_signals.summary: Italian oil company Eni SpA and commodity merchant Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. signed an agreement to join forces in trading, seeking growth in an area that has seen huge price swings and profit opportunities during the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Software Gains as Guggenheim Says AI No ‘Death Knell’ for Sector
top_signals.summary: Software shares rose in premarket trading after Guggenheim upgraded a trio of companies, saying fears that artificial intelligence poses a mortal threat to the sector are overdone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Planes leaving half full in EU border chaos, says industry
top_signals.summary: Airports and airlines warn delays will worsen over summer unless they are allowed to abandon new checks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI and crypto wealth driving private jet boom, says Flexjet
top_signals.summary: Partial ownership group now has customers in their twenties
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: North Sea oil and renewables: The UK’s next PM faces a defining energy policy decision
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham could face an early test over North Sea oil drilling as energy shocks revive the UK energy security debate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan raises visa fees fivefold to tackle overtourism
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. auto industry faces more uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
top_signals.summary: A major issue for automakers is the deal's rules of origin, which determine where a product comes from and which goods are eligible for preferential treatment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: S&P Winning Streak for July at Risk With Volatile End to Month
top_signals.summary: July is a great time to buy stocks. In fact, it’s been the best month for the S&P 500 Index in the past two decades. Bulls are finding comfort in that history ahead of what stands to be an eventful stretch.

top_signals.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it - CNBC
